notice.title: Mid-term Exam Schedule Published
notice.body: The mid-term schedule for all departments is now available on the portal. Please review your respective course timings and report any clashes immediately.

notice.title: Guest Lecture by Industry Experts
notice.body: Join us this Friday at the main auditorium for an exclusive tech talk on the future of web development, featuring guest speakers from leading tech firms.

notice.title: Fall Semester Course Registration
notice.body: Registration for the upcoming Fall semester opens next Monday. Ensure all pending library fines and tuition fees are cleared before attempting to register.

notice.title: Campus Wi-Fi Maintenance
notice.body: The campus network infrastructure will undergo scheduled maintenance this coming Saturday from 10 PM to 2 AM. Expect intermittent connectivity issues during this window.

notice.title: Final Project Submission Guidelines
notice.body: Updated guidelines for final year projects have been uploaded. Formatting requirements have changed, so carefully review the new document before submission.

notice.title: Annual Sports Week Registration
notice.body: Sign up for the Annual Sports Week! Forms are available at the physical education department. Competitions will be held for cricket, football, and table tennis.

notice.title: Library Late Fee Amnesty
notice.body: To encourage the return of overdue books, the library is offering a full amnesty on late fees next week. Please return any outstanding materials.

notice.title: Release of Final Exam Admit Cards
notice.body: Admit cards for the final examinations can now be downloaded from the student portal. Physical copies must be printed and brought to the exam halls.
